title: Dupatya oblonga

It is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Dupuytrea oblonga include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

Dupatya oblonga is a unique species within this family, and further research is needed to fully understand its classification and characteristics.
